focus: Plan gating, MCP/API separation, and rate limits
noveltyJustification: Six findings are new entitlement/rate-limit facts and two convert earlier workflow facts into concrete troubleshooting constraints.
keyQuestions: Which capabilities are available to free users versus Pro subscribers, and what failure/upgrade behavior must the packet document without guessing?
What credential model does the server use, how is the key provisioned/stored, and what does a correct Code Mode manual need to expose?
What exact transport packet, `sk-design` pairing, discovery-first calling convention, UTCP registration shape, and troubleshooting guidance should phases 002–003 author?
answeredQuestions: Which capabilities are available to free users versus Pro subscribers, and what failure/upgrade behavior must the packet document without guessing?
ruledOut: REST API key reused for MCP
Free described as a limited MCP tier
Base MCP promised to include Finance+

graphEvents.label: MCP is available on Pro Team Enterprise only

label: MCP is unavailable on Free and included on Pro Team Enterprise
REST API is Team Enterprise only and uses a workspace API key, distinct from MCP OAuth
MCP limit is 60 requests per 60 seconds per user with 429 Retry-After

direction: Limited free MCP inferred from free website browsing
reason: Official MCP availability begins at Pro
